jsonLd.title: Groww is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!
